01
about me

Who I Am

I am a final-year Information Systems student at Universitas Bina Sarana Informatika, graduating with a near-perfect GPA of 3.95/4.00. My academic journey has been deeply rooted in both the technical and analytical dimensions of information systems.

I specialize in building web applications using CodeIgniter and MySQL, and I have hands-on experience in data processing and evaluation through tools like RapidMiner. My internship at Kantor Kecamatan Bekasi Utara gave me real-world exposure to digital-based administrative services.

I am passionate about leveraging technology to improve efficiency and support data-driven decision-making. With a strong foundation in both development and analytics, I bring a holistic perspective to every project I work on.
